Apresentador Macaco.audio_ref_moss: G:/YOUTUBE/MACACO DRIVER/Clonagem de Voz MACACO DRIVER/base de clonagem macaco driver.MP3
Apresentador Macaco.instrucao_base_tts: "Male voice, medium-low pitch, highly articulate and pedantic. Starts with extreme arrogance, superiority, and condescending educational calmness, sounding like a genius explaining obvious things. As impossible events occur, the confidence violently shatters. The rhythm becomes erratic, stammering with denial and disbelief. Toward the climax, the voice completely loses all professionalism, escalating into absolute hysterical panic, screaming at the top of his lungs, and displaying childish, explosive fury at inanimate objects."
